CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Account_OBS_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Account_OBS_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName, IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__c )), Account_OBS_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Account_OBS_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName , Account__r.CSM_Owner1__r.FirstName & " " & Account__r.CSM_Owner1__r.LastName) )
CustomField.label: Account OBS Owner
